lesson_title: Arabic Conversation for Beginners #2 | The Family  [Turn On Subtitles]

sentences.english: What are you doing?
sentences.arabic: ماذا تفعل يا اخي؟

sentences.english: I'm looking at pictures Show me that picture Here you go Who are the in the photo?
sentences.arabic: أنا أنظر الى صور أرني هذه الصورة تفضل، انظر من هؤلاء على الصورة؟

sentences.english: These people in the photo are my family and relatives Your family is very big!
sentences.arabic: هؤلاء على الصورة اسرتي،

sentences.english: All praise is to Allah Who is this old man?
sentences.arabic: واقاربي ما شاء الله اسرتك كبيرة جدا الحمد لله ومن هذا الشيخ؟

sentences.english: This old man is my grandfather.
sentences.arabic: هذا الشيخ

sentences.english: What's his name?
sentences.arabic: جدي ما

sentences.english: His name is Ali.
sentences.arabic: اسمه؟ اسمه

sentences.english: How old is he?
sentences.arabic: علي وكم عمره؟

sentences.english: His age is 90 years He is very old Does he work?
sentences.arabic: عمره تسعون 90 عاما ما شاء الله هو كبير في السن هل هو يعمل؟

sentences.english: No, he doesn't work now, he is retired Who is this elderly woman?
sentences.arabic: الان هو لا يعمل، هو متقاعد ومن هذه العجوز؟

sentences.english: This old woman is my grandmother What is her name?
sentences.arabic: هذه العجوز جدتي ما اسمها؟

sentences.english: Her name is Sophia How old is she?
sentences.arabic: اسمها صفيا وكم عمرها؟

sentences.english: She is 80 years old Who is this man?
sentences.arabic: عمرها ثمانون عاما ومن هذا الرجل؟

sentences.english: This is my father What's his name?
sentences.arabic: هذا الرجل ابي ما اسمه؟

sentences.english: His name is Khalid What is his profession?
sentences.arabic: اسمه خالد وما مهنته؟

sentences.english: He is a businessman Who is this woman?
sentences.arabic: هو رجل الأعمال ومن هذه المرأة؟

sentences.english: This woman is my mom Does she work?
sentences.arabic: هذه المرأة أمي هل هي تعمل؟

sentences.english: Yes, she works with my father, She is an accountant Who is this man?
sentences.arabic: نعم، هي تعمل مع أبي، هي محاسبة ومن هذا الرجل؟

sentences.english: This is my uncle What is his profession?
sentences.arabic: هذا الرجل عمي وما مهنته؟

sentences.english: He is an engineer Who are these guys?
sentences.arabic: هو مهندس ومن هؤلاء الشباب؟

sentences.english: These guys are my uncle's sons What are their names?
sentences.arabic: هؤلاء الشباب أبناء عمي ما اسماؤهم؟

sentences.english: This is Zeid, and this is Muhammad, and that is Ahmad Do they work?
sentences.arabic: هذا زيد، وهذا محمد، وذلك أحمد هل هم يعملون؟

sentences.english: No, they don't work, they learn they are university students Who is this girl?
sentences.arabic: لا، هم لا يعملون هم يدرسون، هم طلاب في الجامعة ومن هذه الفتاة؟

sentences.english: This girl is my uncle's daughter Does she work?
sentences.arabic: هذه الفتاة بنت عمي هل هي تعمل؟

sentences.english: Yes, she works, she is a journalist Who is this woman?
sentences.arabic: نعم هي تعمل، هي صحفية ومن هذه المرأة؟

sentences.english: This woman is my maternal aunt What is her profession?
sentences.arabic: هذه المرأة خالتي وما مهنتها؟

sentences.english: She is a skilled cook, she works in a big restaurant Who are these girls?
sentences.arabic: هي طباخة ماهرة، هي تعمل في مطعم كبير ومن هؤلاء الفتيات؟

sentences.english: These girls are my aunt's daughters What are their names?
sentences.arabic: هؤلاء الفتيات بنات خالتي ما أسماؤهن؟

sentences.english: Their names are:this is Aisha, and this is Khadija, and this is Latifa
sentences.arabic: أسماؤهن: هذه عائشة، وهذه خديجة، وتلك لطيفة.

sentences.english: Do they work?
sentences.arabic: هل هن يعملن؟

sentences.english: No, they don't work, they go to school, they are schoolgirls Who is this girl?
sentences.arabic: لا، هن لا يعملن، هن يدرسن في المدرسة، هن طالبات ومن هذه الفتاة؟

sentences.english: This girl is my sister Is she married or not?
sentences.arabic: هذه الفتاة أختي هل هي متزوجة أو عازبة؟

sentences.english: She is married Does your sister work?
sentences.arabic: هي متزوجة هل أختك تعمل؟

sentences.english: Yes, she works in a hospital, she is a doctor
sentences.arabic: نعم، هي تعمل في المستشفى، هي طبيبة.

sentences.english: Who are these two girls?
sentences.arabic: من هاتان البنتان؟

sentences.english: These two girls are my sister's daughters, Jamila and Fatima
sentences.arabic: هاتان البنتان بنتا أختي جميلة وفاطمة.

sentences.english: Do they study at school?
sentences.arabic: هل هما تدرسان في المدرسة؟

sentences.english: No, they are small, they study in the kindergarten Who is this guy?
sentences.arabic: لا هما صغيرتان، هما تدرسان في روضة الأطفال ومن هذا الشاب؟

sentences.english: This guy is my little brother And what is his name?
sentences.arabic: هذا الشاب أخي الأصغر ما اسمه؟

sentences.english: His name is Khalid What is his profession?
sentences.arabic: اسمه خالد وما مهنته؟

sentences.english: He works as a programmer Is he married or single?
sentences.arabic: هو يعمل مبرمجاً هل هو متزوج أو عازب؟

sentences.english: He is single And this is you, right?
sentences.arabic: هو عازب هذا أنت صحيح؟

sentences.english: Yes, that's right, it's me
sentences.arabic: نعم، صحيح هذا أنا.

sentences.english: Who is this woman?
sentences.arabic: ومن هذه المرأة؟

sentences.english: This woman is my wife
sentences.arabic: هذه المرأة زوجتي.

sentences.english: Does she work?
sentences.arabic: هل هي تعمل؟

sentences.english: She is not working now, she's a housewife
sentences.arabic: الآن هي لا تعمل، هي ربة بيت

sentences.english: Who are these two boys?
sentences.arabic: من هذان الولدان؟

sentences.english: These two boys are my sons Umar and Ali May Allah grant you grace
sentences.arabic: هذان الولدان ابناي، عمر وعلي بارك الله فيك وفي أسرتك
